title: Strategic Deterrence
description: The Strategic Deterrence organization focuses on strengthening national security through innovative experiments, theories, and computational technologies to ensure the safety, security, and effectiveness of the U.S. nuclear deterrent. It supports multidisciplinary team science, workforce development, and strategic partnerships to address emerging threats and modernize the nuclear security enterprise.
text:
Innovations in experiments, theories, and computation to ensure the safety, security, and effectiveness of our nation’s nuclear deterrent.
The Strategic Deterrence (SD) organization, formerly known as Weapons and Complex Integration (WCI), provides foundational capabilities to a broad range of national security missions and ensures the success of the strategic nuclear deterrent into the future. Following our strong tradition of multidisciplinary team science, we nurture an exceptional workforce and effectively partner with stakeholders to achieve national security impact.
